overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, beginning in a covered neon-lit plaza, crossing a street with futuristic vehicles, and continuing along a waterfront promenade with palm trees before descending onto a wooden marina dock. The footage features wet reflective surfaces, hazy orange-pink skies, and prominent neon signage characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered pedestrian arcade toward open street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza past illuminated advertising displays

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead through the arcade
child in blue jacket walking alongside

entered.detail: large illuminated screens displaying futuristic vehicle advertisements
overhead structural covering with visible beams and lighting
pink and purple neon signage for various businesses
glossy wet floor reflecting the neon lights overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian arcade with wet reflective pavement mirroring the vibrant pink and purple neon signage overhead. Large digital advertising panels line the left wall displaying vehicle ads, while pedestrians in casual futuristic clothing walk through the space. The camera moves steadily forward toward the arcade exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to waterfront promenade

events.description: exits covered arcade into open street with visible sky and traffic
crossing the street while a futuristic vehicle with blue underglow waits at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating across the street while avoiding pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with cyan neon underglow waiting at the intersection
person in bright pink jacket crossing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: sleek black vehicle with glowing cyan undercarriage lighting
tall commercial building with large pink neon signage reading BREWING CO
marked pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
tall palm trees visible in the distance marking the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered arcade, the scene opens into a hazy urban intersection at dusk. A futuristic vehicle with cyan underglow waits at the crosswalk while the camera crosses the street. The multi-story building ahead features prominent pink neon signage, and palm trees become visible in the distance marking the transition to the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian promenade with marina views

events.description: reaching the waterfront promenade with water and boats visible to the left
sun setting behind buildings creates orange reflection on the water surface

agents.ego_description: strolling along the waterfront walkway observing the marina and distant skyline

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: concrete barrier separating the walkway from the water below
distinctive angular building with NCART signage at the dock
hazy silhouette of tall city towers against the orange sky
yachts and watercraft docked at the marina visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wide waterfront promenade lined with palm trees on the left and modern buildings on the right. The NCART marina building with its distinctive angular architecture dominates the left side, while the hazy distant skyline glows orange in the setting sun. The water reflects the warm dusk light, and a few pedestrians stroll along the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden marina dock between moored boats

events.description: descending stairs from promenade level down to the wooden dock
walking onto the wooden pier surrounded by moored boats on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs onto the wooden dock then proceeding along the pier between moored vessels

notable_agents.action: lone figure walking ahead on the dock toward the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden walkway surface with visible planks and grain
futuristic yachts and boats with covered hulls docked alongside
covered watercraft and small vessels moored on the right side
modern street lamps illuminating the wooden walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs from the promenade onto a wooden marina dock, transitioning from concrete to weathered planks. The path narrows between moored futuristic yachts and covered boats on both sides, with modern dock lighting poles lining the left side. The NCART building is now visible across the water to the right, while the hazy orange sky continues to glow in the background. A lone figure walks ahead on the dock toward the open water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched pedestrian arcade into a hazy waterfront district at dusk. It begins within a covered walkway where wet pavement mirrors vibrant pink and purple signage, moving steadily forward past digital advertising panels and futuristic pedestrians. As the camera exits the arcade, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where a vehicle with cyan underglow waits at a crosswalk, and the view expands to reveal distant palm trees under a glowing orange sky. The movement then shifts along a wide promenade lined with modern architecture and the angular NCART marina building before descending a set of stairs from the concrete path. Finally, the camera transitions onto a weathered wooden dock, narrowing between moored futuristic yachts and lighting poles as it follows a lone figure toward the open water.
